data.biography:
Damian Robert Chapa (born October 29, 1963) is a Native-Latino American actor, film director and film producer.

Chapa was born in Dayton, Ohio, USA. He was briefly married to Natasha Henstridge. Among his earlier notable film roles are one of the leads in Taylor Hackford's Blood In Blood Out and the part of Ken in the film adaptation of Street Fighter. Subsequently, Chapa has directed and produced, in addition to starring in, his own films. These movies include 1998's Kill You Twice, 2000's The Lonely Life of Downey Hall, 2002's Man of Faith, 2004's Shade of Pale, 2004's El Padrino, and 2006's I.R.A.: King of Nothing.

Chapa co-wrote and directed Polanski Unauthorized, a biopic of Roman Polanski, in which he played the title role. It was released on February 13, 2009, in Los Angeles, California. Chapa will begin filming the only film about Marlon Brando ever to be made, in June 2010 called Brando Unauthorized. He followed this with "Vatos Locos", starring himself. Albert Pyun was supposed to direct, but left the project following a dispute over his salary, so Chapa directed himself. The film is about the Chinese mafia in Los Angeles and how the Mexican gang boys, known as "vatos," fought back and defeated the Chinese gang-bangers.

As of 2011, Chapa has yet another project in development, an indie drama titled "The Best So Far," which takes place in the late 80's, about a small-town Canadian girl who loves Judo and dreams about being one of the finalists at the '88 Olympics. The ensemble drama follows the lines of Rocky, in the sense that it's not about winning, but going the distance and getting your life back. Chapa, who wrote the drama, will play the widowed father, who does his best to make life easier for his daughter. Although the film is in its very early development stages, Chapa hopes the script will attract the interest of talented artists such as Ellen Page for the main role and Jennifer Connelly for the supporting role, this being the part of the final, toughest competition Page's character faces off during the '88 Olympics and gets defeated by. Although not winning, she gets her sense of victory be offering a brave stand against the better fighter, and both discover, in the process, they are quite simillar, despite their differences. Insiders who had a chance to read the script stated that it is one of the finest not-yet-filmed scripts they had ever seen. Acclaimed director David Cronenberg asked for New Line to bid for the script, but Chapa wouldn't sell it, because of his determination to direct the picture himself. The project is slated to be shot sometime in mid-2012, for tentative release in 2013 at the Sundance Film Festival.

data.biography: Después de sus tres años en Florent, de 1993 a 1996, Philippe Bas siguió los castings y pronto encontró sus primeros papeles en cine y televisión. Actuar bajo la dirección de Francis Huster, en "La guerra de Troya no se llevará a cabo", parece haber sido un buen escalón en su carrera. Su primera aparición en la pantalla grande es la de un prisionero en Memorias de un joven estafador, especialmente junto a Mathilde Seigner. También debutó el mismo año en el lado de la televisión en la serie Extreme Limit. Posteriormente, el actor representa los personajes de: Julie Lescaut, Navarro, Maigret, Cordier, juez y policía ... Después de Adieu, ¡piso de las vacas! Otar Iosseliani, presentado en el Festival de Cine de Cannes en 1999, obtuvo en 2000 su primer papel de protagonista en Te Quiero de Manuel Poirier. Tres años más tarde, interpreta al hermano de Michel Vaillant en la película del mismo nombre, y le entrega la réplica a Jean Reno en la película de Chris Nahon: El imperio de los lobos en 2005. Aún alternando entre cine y televisión, participa. especialmente las películas Scorpion de Julien Seri, Pars vite y el regreso tardío de Régis Wargnier con José Garcia, Marie Gillain y Michel Serrault, o el aniversario de Diane Kurys ... Pero marca el espíritu al actuar como Greco, un policía que tiene Visiones después de permanecer en coma, en la fantástica serie del mismo nombre para France 2 en 2007, que reúne a un promedio de cuatro millones de espectadores en cada transmisión. Al año siguiente, se pierde entre Cristiana Reali y Elsa Lunghini, en la adaptación televisada para M6 de la novela de Marc Levy, ¿Dónde estás? Sin detenerse en ningún género predefinido, se pone el traje vintage en Le Vernis Crack y el episodio "Pour une nuit d'amour" de Maupassant's Tales and News. En 2010, intenta la comedia romántica en Un marido demasiado cercano a Alain Delon y Lorie, emitido en TF1. Previo a la temporada 2 de Invincibles d'Arte, se convierte en un francotirador del GIGN en la película de Julien Leclercq, L'Assaut, y finalmente en Les Mouvements du bassin junto a Éric Cantona. Al acercarse la cuarentena TF1 le pide nuevamente que suceda a Guillaume Cramoisan en Profilage, en la tercera temporada. Su dúo con Odile Vuillemin, bajo la forma del comandante Thomas Rocher, le garantiza una buena audiencia ante el público en general.

Philippe Bas est un comédien français, né le 31 octobre 1973 à Paris.

Philippe Bas naît en 31 octobre 1973 à Paris.

En 1993, il s'inscrit en tant que membre de la Classe libre du Cours Florent, jusqu'en 1996.  En 1995, il fait sa première apparition à la télévision pour Arte dans Attention fragile de Manuel Poirier. La même année, il débute au cinéma dans Mémoires d'un jeune con de et avec Patrick Aurignac, puis apparaît l'année suivante dans plusieurs téléfilms et séries télévisées, la plupart policières (Julie Lescaut, Navarro, etc.)

Fin 1997, il joue au palais de Chaillot dans la pièce Dommage qu'elle soit une putain, de John Ford, mise en scène par Jérôme Savary. Il tourne l'été suivant dans la première réalisation de Richard Bohringer: le téléfilm Les coquelicots sont revenus, ainsi que le long métrage Adieu, plancher des vaches! d'Otar Iosseliani, sélection officielle du Festival de Cannes 1999 hors compétition, prix Louis-Delluc 1999.

Personnage principal du long métrage Te quiero de Manuel Poirier (en 2000), il tourne également plusieurs téléfilms dont: Vent de poussière, Les Murmures de la forêt, réalisés par Renaud Bertrand, Les Semailles et les Moissons de Christian François et pour le cinéma Les Petites Couleurs de Patricia Plattner (2001). En 2003, il est le frère du héros dans Michel Vaillant, film de Louis-Pascal Couvelaire puis enchaîne avec le long-métrage de Chris Nahon aux côtés de Jean Reno: L'Empire des loups.

Toujours en alternance entre cinéma et télévision, il participe notamment aux films Scorpion, de Julien Seri et Pars vite et reviens tard de Régis Wargnier, L’Anniversaire de Diane Kurys mais surtout interprète le personnage «Greco» dans la série fantastique du même nom pour France 2. Il incarne ensuite des rôles particulièrement différents dans Mort prématurée, sous la direction de José Pinheiro et Passés troubles de Serge Meynard.

En 2007, il tourne Où es tu?, première adaptation télévisée du roman éponyme de Marc Levy, réalisé par Miguel Courtois, ainsi qu’un long métrage du même réalisateur Skate or Die où il incarne un flic tueur et corrompu. Il collabore de nouveau avec Julien Seri dans le moyen métrage Sables noirs pour CinéCinéma, et les téléfilms Alice et Charlie (pour M6), puis Facteur chance (pour TF1).

En 2010, on le retrouve dans une comédie romantique aux côtés de Lorie, Alain Delon et Alexandre Varga: le téléfilm Un mari de trop de Louis Choquette pour TF1, ainsi que sur Arte dans la série Les Invincibles.

En 2011, au cinéma, il joue l'un des membres du GIGN dans le film de Julien Leclercq: L’Assaut aux côtés de Vincent Elbaz et Mélanie Bernier ainsi que dans le deuxième long métrage d'HPG, sorti en 2012: Les Mouvements du bassin, avec Éric Cantona et Rachida Brakni.

Il interprète actuellement Thomas Rocher, le personnage principal masculin de la série Profilage pour TF1 depuis la troisième saison, en 2012.

En octobre 2017, il rejoint le tournage du téléfilm Coup de foudre à Bora Bora, dont la sortie est prévue en 2018 sur TF1. En janvier 2018, il tourne dans la neuvième saison de Profilage. ...

Source: Article "Philippe Bas" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

Kalinka Petrie is a bilingual actress who has made a name for herself both in the French and English markets over the past decade. Throughout her career, she has been given the opportunity to portray a wide range of roles. She debuted as a high school cheerleader on Tactik, which launched her career in Quebec. More recently, Kalinka has appeared in District 31 and Clash, both Aetios productions. Portraying a rape victim and a malignant narcissist respectively, were perhaps the most challenging roles Kalinka has been offered so far. She also showcased her comedic skills over four seasons in the award-winning Crave original, Letterkenny. Make sure to watch Kalinka in When Hope Calls, on Hallmark Movies Now, in which she embodies a strong female character.

From her agency profile at https://agencelasuite.com/en/artists/kalinka_petrie/994

data.biography: 卡林卡·皮特里（Kalinka Petrie）是一位双语女演员，在过去十年中，她在法国和英国市场都声名鹊起。在她的整个职业生涯中，她有机会扮演各种各样的角色。她作为高中啦啦队长首次亮相 Tactik，这在魁北克开始了她的职业生涯。最近，卡林卡出现在 31 区和 Clash 中，这两部都是 Aetios 的作品。分别扮演强奸受害者和恶性自恋者，也许是卡林卡迄今为止获得的最具挑战性的角色。她还在屡获殊荣的 Crave 原创作品《莱特肯尼》中展示了她在四个赛季中的喜剧技巧。一定要看卡林卡在Hallmark Movies Now上的《当希望来电时》，她在其中体现了一个坚强的女性角色。
data.name: 卡林卡·皮特里

data.biography: 卡林卡·皮特里（Kalinka Petrie）是一位雙語女演員，在過去十年中，她在法國和英國市場都聲名鵲起。在她的整個職業生涯中，她有機會扮演各種各樣的角色。她作為高中啦啦隊長首次亮相 Tactik，這在魁北克開始了她的職業生涯。最近，卡林卡出現在 31 區和 Clash 中，這兩部都是 Aetios 的作品。分別扮演強奸受害者和惡性自戀者，也許是卡林卡迄今為止獲得的最具挑戰性的角色。她還在屢獲殊榮的 Crave 原創作品《萊特肯尼》中展示了她在四個賽季中的喜劇技巧。一定要看卡林卡在 Hallmark Movies Now 上的《當希望來電時》，她在其中體現了一個堅強的女性角色。

data.biography:
Thomas Thieme (born 29 October 1948) is a German actor. He is considered to be a prolific stage actor and also appeared in more than 100 film and television productions since 1973.

In his film and television appearances, Thieme often plays powerful but morally dubious characters. He is perhaps best-known internationally for his roles as Martin Bormann in Downfall (2004) and as Communist minister Bruno Hempf in the Oscar-winning The Lives of Others, for which he was compared to Sydney Greenstreet by Roger Ebert in his review. He played former Bayern Munich boss Uli Hoeneß, who had to spent time in jail for tax evasion, in the 2015 television film Der Patriarch. He had a recurring role in the successful series Babylon Berlin as the police chief Karl Zörgiebel.
data.name: Thomas Thieme

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Ronald Jason "Ron" Eldard (born February 20, 1965) is an American actor. Eldard made his film debut in the 1989 comedy True Love, written and directed by Nancy Savoca, and co-starring Annabella Sciorra. This film won the Grandy Jury Prize at the Sundance Film Festival. Eldard has performed on Broadway in critically acclaimed productions of On the Waterfront, Biloxi Blues, Bash: Latterday Plays, and Death of a Salesman. The latter two were filmed for Showtime productions.

Eldard is also known for his evocative role as sympathetic street thug John Reilly in the 1996 film Sleepers which co-starred Brad Pitt, Billy Crudup, Jason Patric, Kevin Bacon, Dustin Hoffman, Robert Deniro, and Minnie Driver.

On January 9, 2006 he debuted in the role of Father Flynn in the Tony Award and Pulitzer Prize winning Broadway production of Doubt opposite the British actress Dame Eileen Atkins.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Ron Eldard, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Ron Eldard

data.biography:
Ronald Jason Eldard (* 20. Februar 1965, auf Long Island) ist ein US-amerikanischer Theater- und Filmschauspieler.

Eldard lernte seine frühere Partnerin Julianna Margulies 1991 in einer Schauspielgruppe kennen. Später spielten sie zusammen in der NBC-Serie Emergency Room, wo Eldard einen Sanitäter namens Shep verkörperte. Auch im Film Ghost Ship aus dem Jahr 2002 spielten sie zusammen. Ihre Beziehung endete 2003.

Eldard hat auch in verschiedenen hoch angesehenen Broadway-Theaterproduktionen mitgewirkt wie zum Beispiel 2006 in "Doubt". 2013 übernahm er in "Justified" die Rolle des skrupellosen ehemaligen Militärpolizisten Colton Rhodes.

罗纳德·杰森·埃尔达德（Ronald Jason “Ron” Eldard，1965年2月20日-），美国演员。埃尔达德在 1989 年的喜剧片《真爱》中首次亮相，该片由南希·萨沃卡编剧和导演，安娜贝拉·西奥拉联合主演。这部电影在圣丹斯电影节上获得了格兰迪评审团奖。埃尔达德曾在百老汇演出过广受好评的作品，包括《海滨》、《比洛克西蓝调》、《狂欢：后期戏剧》和《推销员之死》。后两部是为 Showtime 制作而拍摄的。
data.name: 朗·埃达德

Рональд Джейсон «Рон» Элдард (родился 20 февраля 1965 года) — американский актер. Элдард дебютировал в кино в комедии 1989 года «Настоящая любовь», написанной и снятой Нэнси Савокой, с Аннабеллой Шиоррой в главной роли. Этот фильм получил приз жюри Grandy на кинофестивале «Сандэнс». Элдард играл на Бродвее в получивших признание критиков постановках «На набережной», «Билокси блюз», «Баш: пьесы последних дней» и «Смерть коммивояжера». Последние две были сняты для постановок Showtime.

Элдард также известен своей вызывающей воспоминания ролью симпатичного уличного бандита Джона Рейли в фильме 1996 года «Спящие», в котором также снимались Брэд Питт, Билли Крудап, Джейсон Патрик, Кевин Бэйкон, Дастин Хоффман, Роберт Дениро и Минни Драйвер.

9 января 2006 года он дебютировал в роли отца Флинна в бродвейской постановке «Сомнение», удостоенной премии «Тони» и Пулитцеровской премии, в паре с британской актрисой Эйлин Аткинс.

data.name: Рон Элдард

data.biography:
Ronald Jason "Ron" Eldard, 20 Şubat 1965 tarihinde Long Island, New York'ta dünyaya gelmiştir. Yedi çocuklu bir ailenin en küçüğü olan Eldard, New York'un prestijli Sahne Sanatları Lisesi'nde (High School for the Performing Arts) eğitim alarak oyunculuk temellerini attı. Kariyerinin ilk yıllarında tiyatro sahnesinde ve televizyonda çeşitli rollerde yer alarak deneyim kazandı.

Ancak Eldard'ı geniş kitlelere tanıtan ve onu tanıdık bir yüz haline getiren rol, 90'ların fenomen dizisi "ER" oldu. 1995-1996 yılları arasında dizinin en popüler olduğu dönemde canlandırdığı sağlık görevlisi Ray 'Shep' Shepard karakteriyle büyük bir çıkış yakaladı. Televizyondaki bu başarısını, Rob Schneider ile başrolü paylaştığı komedi dizisi "Men Behaving Badly" (1996-1997) ile sürdürerek komedi türündeki yeteneğini de gösterdi. Aynı dönemde sinemada da önemli roller üstlendi. 1996 yapımı yıldızlar geçidi "Kardeş Gibiydiler" (Sleepers) filminde, işkence görmüş dört arkadaştan biri olan John Reilly'nin yetişkinliğini canlandırarak kritik bir rol oynadı. Felaket filmi "Derin Darbe" (Deep Impact) (1998) ve hokey komedisi "Mystery, Alaska" (1999) gibi yapımlarla sinemadaki yerini sağlamlaştırdı.

2000'li yıllar Eldard'ın kariyerindeki en önemli filmlerinden birine sahne oldu. Ridley Scott'ın yönettiği ve büyük beğeni toplayan savaş filmi "Kara Şahin Düştü" (Black Hawk Down) (2001) filminde canlandırdığı, helikopteri düşürülen pilot Michael Durant rolü, onun en unutulmaz performanslarından biri olarak kabul edilir. Bu filmin ardından eleştirmenlerce beğenilen "Sisler Evi" (House of Sand and Fog) (2003) gibi dramalarda ve J.J. Abrams'ın yönettiği bilimkurgu filmi "Super 8" (2011) gibi yapımlarda önemli karakter rollerinde yer aldı.

Eldard, televizyondaki başarılı kariyerine ilerleyen yıllarda da devam etti. Özellikle çok beğenilen suç draması dizisi "Justified"da (2013) canlandırdığı eski asker Colton 'Colt' Rhodes karakteriyle izleyicilerden ve eleştirmenlerden bir kez daha tam not aldı. Ron Eldard, hem televizyonda hem de sinemada, drama ve komedi arasında rahatlıkla geçiş yapabilen, güvenilir ve çok yönlü bir karakter oyuncusu olarak otuz yılı aşkın süredir kariyerini başarıyla sürdürmektedir.

data.overview: Đầu Bếp Lập Dị kể về Moon Seung Mo là một đầu bếp vô cùng nổi tiếng nhưng đã chuyển đến ngôi làng Seoha sinh sống sau khi bố mẹ anh qua đời vì hỏa hoạn. Thế rồi một ngày kia, cuộc sống yên bình êm ả của anh bị xáo trộn bởi sự xuất hiện bất ngờ của cô gái có tên Yoo Yoo Jin. Yoo Yoo Jin là một nhà thiết kế thời trang xinh đẹp và nổi tiếng thế giới. Cô làm việc dưới cái tên Yoo Bella. Bất ngờ xảy ra khi cô bị tai nạn xe hơi. Vụ tai nạn xe hơi khiến cô mất trí nhớ hoàn toàn và cuối cùng cô dọn đến làng Seoha để nghỉ dưỡng.

Trong bộ phim, nhân vật nam chính đã có cuộc gặp gỡ với một cô gái say rượu trên tàu điện và điều này đã làm thay đổi cuộc đời anh. Nội dung phim dựa trên một câu chuyện có thật được kể lại qua một chuỗi những lá thư tình viết bởi Kim Ho-sik, người khởi đầu đã gửi chúng trên Internet và sau đó chuyển thể chúng thành tiểu thuyết.

data.biography:
Anthony Perkins (April 4, 1932 – September 12, 1992) was an American actor and singer. He is best known for his role as Norman Bates in Alfred Hitchcock's Psycho and his Oscar-nominated role in Friendly Persuasion (1956). He made his film debut in The Actress (1953) directed by George Cukor before experiencing success on Broadway with Elia Kazan’s production of Tea and Sympathy (1955).

He quickly became one of Hollywood’s biggest stars, working alongside actors such as Henry Fonda (The Tin Star), Sophia Loren (Desire Under the Elms), Shirley MacLaine (The Matchmaker), Audrey Hepburn (Green Mansions), and Gregory Peck, Fred Astaire, and Ava Gardner (On the Beach).

He left Hollywood in 1960 and had a successful career in Europe, where he co-starred with Ingrid Bergman (Aimez-vous Brahms?), Melina Mercouri (Phaedra), Brigitte Bardot (Une ravissante idiote), and Romy Schneider, Jeanne Moreau, Elsa Martinelli, and Orson Welles (Le procès). He returned to Hollywood in 1968 with Pretty Poison, which became a cult classic.

In the decades that followed, his career continued to flourish alongside personalities like Diana Ross (Mahogany), Jeff Goldblum (Remember My Name), Elizabeth Taylor (Winter Kills), John Candy (Double Negative), and Lauren Bacall (Murder on the Orient Express). In 1973, he co-wrote The Last of Sheila with Stephen Sondheim.

During his career, he won a Golden Globe, a Cannes Award, and a David di Donatello Award, and was nominated for two Tony Awards and one Academy Award. Perkins died on September 12, 1992, of AIDS complications.
data.name: Anthony Perkins

data.biography:
Anthony Perkins (Nueva York, 4 de abril de 1932 – Hollywood, 12 de septiembre de 1992) fue un actor estadounidense cuyo trabajo más conocido fue su papel como el asesino en serie Norman Bates en la película Psicosis (Psycho) de Alfred Hitchcock (1960).

Fue hijo del actor Osgood Perkins (James Ripley Osgood Perkins, 1891–1937) y Janet Esseltyn Rane. Sus inicios en el cine fueron inmejorables: su primera película fue La Actriz (The Actress; 1953), junto a Spencer Tracy y Jean Simmons; y recibió una nominación al Óscar por su papel en su segunda película Friendly Persuasion (1956), protagonizada por Gary Cooper.

Después, rodó con una joven Sophia Loren Desire Under the Elms, con Silvana Mangano rodó This Angry Age (La diga sul Pacifico, 1958), bajo dirección de René Clement, y con una debutante Jane Fonda trabajó en Tall Story (Me casaré contigo).

Después de participaciones aclamadas en Broadway, como Té y simpatía con Joan Fontaine, interpretó al protagonista Norman Bates en la hoy legendaria película Psycho. Mucha gente opinó que merecía el Oscar por este papel, pero no fue nominado. Después rodó Phaedra con Melina Mercouri, bajo dirección de Jules Dassin.

Después de viajar a Europa para realizar el papel de Joseph K. en la aclamada adaptación al cine de la obra de Franz Kafka El proceso (The Trial), dirigida por Orson Welles, Perkins regresó a Estados Unidos para tomar el papel de un joven asesino en Pretty Poison, el cual afectó al resto de su carrera, que en la década de 1970 entró en declive.

Protagonizó en los años 1980 las secuelas y la precuela de Psicosis: Psicosis II, Psicosis III (que él dirigió) y Psicosis IV: El Inicio. A pesar del éxito, la mayoría de sus trabajos posteriores fueron en películas para TV. Perkins también co-escribió el guion para la película The Last of Sheila (1973) junto con el compositor Stephen Sondheim.

En 1991 recibió el Premio Donostia a su carrera, otorgado por el Festival de Cine de San Sebastián. En esas fechas había rodado la película española Los gusanos no llevan bufanda, comedia dirigida por Javier Elorrieta.

La vida de Perkins fue meticulosamente documentada en la biografía Anthony Perkins: Split Image por Charles Winecoff (Alyson Books, 2006).

Американский актёр и кинорежиссёр. Энтони Перкинс - сын известного бродвейского актера Осгуда Перкинса. Окончил Роллинз-Колледж, Колумбийский университет. В 1956 и 1957 годах Энтони Перкинс выдвигался на премию «Оскар» — первый раз за фильм Уильяма Уайлера «Дружеское увещевание», который выиграл «Золотую пальмовую ветвь». Снимался в нескольких фильмах с Софи Лорен («Любовь под вязами» и др.), работал с Орсоном Уэллсом над экранизацией романа Кафки «Процесс», а в 1961 году был удостоен приза Каннского кинофестиваля за роль в картине «Любите ли вы Брамса?». Считался одной из самых многообещающих голливудских звёзд конца 1950-х годов. Мировую и, вместе с тем, фатальную известность, получил после роли в фильме Хичкока «Психо» 1960 года. В дальнейшем режиссёры видели актёра только в образах психически неуравновешенных парней. Он никогда не скрывал своей бисексуальности, умер от пневмонии, по некоторым слухам, спровоцированной СПИДом, в возрасте 60 лет. Вдова, Берри Беренсон, трагически погибла 11 сентября 2001 года в одном из самолётов, врезавшихся в башни-близнецы в Нью-Йорке.
data.name: Энтони Перкинс

data.biography:
Anthony Perkins (* 4. April 1932 in New York City; † 12. September 1992 in Hollywood) war ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler und Regisseur. In Alfred Hitchcocks Klassiker Psycho schrieb er in der Rolle des krankhaft mutterfixierten Motelbesitzers Norman Bates Filmgeschichte, dessen 3. Teil er in den 80ern sogar neben der Hauptrolle selbst als Regisseur fortsetzte.

Anthony Perkins gab sein Filmdebüt 1953 in Theaterfieber, einem von George Cukor inszenierten Drama, an der Seite von Spencer Tracy, Jean Simmons und Teresa Wright. In seinem zweiten Film Lockende Versuchung spielte er den Quäkersohn von Gary Cooper und erhielt 1956 eine Nominierung für den Oscar sowie dem Golden Globe Award als Bester Nachwuchsdarsteller. Seine erste eigene Hauptrolle hatte er 1957 im Film Fear Strikes Out, in dem er den Baseballspieler Jimmy Piersall verkörperte. 1959 spielte Perkins eine größere Rolle in dem Endzeit-Drama Das letzte Ufer mit, das zahlreiche Nominierungen und Auszeichnungen für bedeutende Filmpreise erhielt. Für seine Rolle in Lieben Sie Brahms? nach dem gleichnamigen Roman von Françoise Sagan gewann er den Darstellerpreis bei den Filmfestspielen von Cannes 1961.

Anthony Perkins gehörte einer neuen Generation von Hollywoodschauspielern an, die sich von dem stereotypen Männerbild des frühen Hollywood, welches maßgeblich von Schauspielern wie John Wayne geprägt war, abheben wollte. Im Gegensatz zu den scheinbar unverwundbaren, „harten“ Männern, rückten nun junge, zweifelnde, gefühlsbetonte, oft auch psychisch labile Anti-Helden ins Zentrum der Filme, zu anderen Vertretern zählten etwa John Garfield, James Dean, Montgomery Clift und Marlon Brando.

Nach weiteren erfolgreichen Auftritten im Film und am Broadway folgte 1960 Perkins’ bis heute bekannteste Rolle als identitätsgestörter Mörder in Psycho von Alfred Hitchcock. Die Figur des Norman Bates wurde später vom American Film Institute bei der Wahl zu den 50 größten Schurken des amerikanischen Films auf Platz 2 gewählt und erlangte auch über den Film hinaus Kultstatus. Da Perkins verhindern wollte, durch den Erfolg des Films auf ähnliche Rollen festgelegt zu werden, wandte er sich vielseitigeren Rollenangeboten in Europa zu. In den folgenden Jahren wirkte er dort in einigen erfolgreichen Produktionen mit, so als Joseph K. in Orson Welles’ Film Der Prozeß. Zu seinen folgenden Filmen zählten Phaedra, Die dritte Dimension und Der zehnte Tag. Als Koautor zum Filmdrehbuch des Kriminalfilmes Sheila betätigte er sich 1973. 1974 spielte er in der starbesetzten Filmadaption des berühmten Kriminalromans Mord im Orient-Express von Agatha Christie mit.

Anthony Perkins, né le 4 avril 1932 à New York et mort le 12 septembre 1992 à Los Angeles, est un acteur et réalisateur américain. Il est connu pour son interprétation de Norman Bates, le personnage principal du film Psychose d'Alfred Hitchcock et de ses suites.

Anthony Richard Perkins, (Nova York, 4 de abril de 1932 — Los Angeles, 12 de setembro de 1992) foi um ator norte-americano, imortalizado por sua performance como Norman Bates no filme Psycho (1960) de Alfred Hitchcock. Em 2003, o American Film Institute classificou Norman Bates como o segundo maior vilão da história do cinema, e sua frase "o melhor amigo de um menino é sua mãe" foi listada na posição 56 das maiores citações do cinema. Ele reviveu o personagem nas três sequências distribuídas pela Universal Pictures. Perkins morreu em sua residência na Hollywood Hills em 12 de setembro de 1992, vítima de complicações decorrentes  da AIDS.

És mundialment conegut per la seva interpretació de Norman Bates, el personatge principal de la pel·lícula Psicosi d'Alfred Hitchcock. 安东尼·帕金斯（Anthony Perkins，1932 年 4 月 4 日 - 1992 年 9 月 12 日）是美国演员和歌手。他最出名的是他在阿尔弗雷德·希区柯克的《惊魂记》中饰演诺曼·贝茨，以及在《友好的劝导》（1956 年）中获得奥斯卡提名的角色。他在乔治·库克（George Cukor）执导的《女演员》（1953）中首次亮相，然后凭借埃利亚·卡赞（Elia Kazan）制作的《茶与同情》（1955）在百老汇取得了成功。

他很快成为好莱坞最大的明星之一，与亨利·方达（《铁皮之星》）、索菲亚·罗兰（《榆树下的欲望》）、雪莉·麦克莱恩（《媒人》）、奥黛丽·赫本（《绿色大厦》）以及格雷戈里·派克、弗雷德·阿斯泰尔和艾娃·加德纳（《海滩上》）等演员合作。

他于 1960 年离开好莱坞，在欧洲取得了成功的职业生涯，在那里他与英格丽·褒曼（《艾梅兹·沃斯·勃拉姆斯》）、梅琳娜·梅尔库里（《费德拉》）、碧姬·芭铎（《白痴》）和罗米·施耐德、珍妮·莫罗、艾尔莎·马丁内利和奥森·威尔斯（《Le procès》）共同主演。他于 1968 年带着 Pretty Poison 重返好莱坞，这部电影成为经典之作。

在随后的几十年里，他的事业继续与戴安娜·罗斯（《桃花心木》）、杰夫·戈德布伦（《记住我的名字》）、伊丽莎白·泰勒（《冬日杀戮》）、约翰·坎迪（《双重否定》）和劳伦·巴考尔（《东方快车谋杀案》）等人物一起蓬勃发展。1973年，他与斯蒂芬·桑德海姆（Stephen Sondheim）合著了《希拉的最后生还者》（The Last of Sheila）。

在他的职业生涯中，他获得了金球奖、戛纳奖和大卫·迪·多纳泰罗奖，并获得了两项托尼奖和一项奥斯卡奖的提名。珀金斯于 1992 年 9 月 12 日死于艾滋病并发症。
data.name: 安东尼·帕金斯

data.biography:
安東尼·帕金斯（Anthony Perkins，1932 年 4 月 4 日 - 1992 年 9 月 12 日）是美國演員和歌手。他最出名的是他在阿爾弗雷德·希區柯克的《觸目驚心》中飾演諾曼·貝茨，以及在《友好的勸導》（1956 年）中獲得奧斯卡提名的角色。他在喬治·庫克（George Cukor）執導的《女演員》（1953）中首次亮相，然後憑藉埃利亞·卡贊（Elia Kazan）製作的《茶與同情》（1955）在百老匯取得了成功。

他很快成為好萊塢最大的明星之一，與亨利·方達（《鐵皮之星》）、索菲亞·羅蘭（《榆樹下的慾望》）、雪莉·麥克萊恩（《媒人》）、奧黛麗·赫本（《綠色大廈》）以及格雷戈裏·派克、弗雷德·阿斯泰爾和艾娃·加德納（《海灘上》）等演員合作。

他於 1960 年離開好萊塢，在歐洲取得了成功的職業生涯，在那裏他與英格麗·褒曼（《艾梅茲·沃斯·勃拉姆斯》）、梅琳娜·梅爾庫裏（《費德拉》）、碧姬·芭鐸（《白痴》）和羅米·施耐德、珍妮·莫羅、艾爾莎·馬丁內利和奧森·威爾斯（《Le procès》）共同主演。他於 1968 年帶著 Pretty Poison 重返好萊塢，這部電影成為經典之作。

在隨後的幾十年裏，他的事業繼續與戴安娜·羅斯（《桃花心木》）、傑夫·戈德布倫（《記住我的名字》）、伊麗莎白·泰勒（《冬日殺戮》）、約翰·坎迪（《雙重否定》）和勞倫·巴考爾（《東方快車謀殺案》）等人物一起蓬勃發展。1973 年，他與斯蒂芬·桑德海姆（Stephen Sondheim）合著了《希拉的最後生還者》（The Last of Sheila）。

在他的職業生涯中，他獲得了金球獎、戛納獎和大衞·迪·多納泰羅獎，並獲得了兩項託尼獎和一項奧斯卡獎的提名。珀金斯於 1992 年 9 月 12 日死於艾滋病併發症。
data.name: 安東尼·帕金斯

data.biography:
Michael Paul Chan (born June 26, 1950) is an American television and film actor. Some of his recent television work includes Judge Lionel Ping on Arrested Development, Robbery Homicide Division, Dr. Lee in the Joel Schumacher directed "Batman & Robin," the voice of Jimmy Ho on The PJ's, and Detective Michael Tao on the TNT series The Closer. He had a recurring role in The Wonder Years as Mr. Chong. He also played the role of Dr. Louis Rob in Mrs. Harris and appears in the independent film, Americanese. Chan also played the part of the convenience store owner in the 1993 film Falling Down, where he refused to give a discount to Michael Douglas' character when he attempted to purchase a can of soda to get change for the pay telephone outside the store. Recently, he was seen playing the bookie "Andy" on the daytime drama the Young and the Restless. He also provided the voice for an agent of the C.I.A. (Chinese Intelligence Agency) on a 2011 episode of "The Simpsons." He made an appearance on the crime/drama/comedy series "Bones".

In 1994, Chan played the character "Roberts" in the episode "The War Prayer" of US TV series Babylon 5. Some of his other movie roles were the Chinese Premier in Megiddo: The Omega Code 2, and as a CIA official, Vincent Vy Ngo, in Spy Game.

Chan, a third generation Chinese American, was born in San Francisco, California. He is a founding member of the Asian American Theater Company. He is married with one child.

data.biography:
Michael Paul Chan (San Francisco, 26 giugno 1950) è un attore statunitense televisivo e cinematografico.

I ruoli televisivi più recenti interpretati da MichaEl includono quello del giudice Lionel Ping in Arrested Development - Ti presento i miei, Robbery Homicide Division ed il tenente Michael Tao in The Closer  e in Major Crimes del canale TNT.  Per quanto riguarda il cinema, è stato suo il ruolo del Dottor Lee in Batman & Robin di Joel Schumacher. Ha interpretato il Dottor Louis Rob nel film Mrs. Harris, ed è anche apparso nel lungometraggio indipendente del 2006 Americanese. Nel 1993, ha recitato nel ruolo del proprietario di un alimentari nel film Un giorno di ordinaria follia, insieme a Michael Douglas. Nello stesso anno ha ottenuto il ruolo di Harold, marito di Lena St. Clair, nel film di Wayne Wang Il circolo della fortuna e della felicità.

Michael Paul Chan (* 26. Juni 1950 in San Francisco, Kalifornien) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Chan begann in den 1970er Jahren seine Karriere als Schauspieler und Synchronsprecher. Er war Stipendiat des American Conservatory Theater und wirkte bei der Asian American Theater Company mit. Weiterhin engagiert er sich im Bereich asiatisch-amerikanischer Kultur. So spielte er in dem Film Americanese mit, der sich mit Problemen gemischtrassiger Paare auseinandersetzt. Chan wirkte in Kinofilmen, Fernsehserien und Theaterstücken mit.

Von 2005 bis 2012 spielte er den Detective Lieutenant und Computerexperten Michael Tao in der Fernsehserie The Closer. Dieselbe Rolle verkörpert Chan auch in der direkt an diese anschließende Nachfolgeserie Major Crimes.

data.biography:
Dragomir Mrsic (born 2 October 1969), nicknamed Gago  is a Serbian-Swedish actor, sports consultant and sports leader.

Mrsic was born in the Rasavci village near Prijedor, SR Bosnia and Herzegovina, Yugoslavia, to father Momir and mother Radojka. His father got a job in Sweden in the late 1960s. Dragomir moved with his mother and two older siblings to Sweden aged a month and a half, and was brought up in Fittja, a suburb of southern Stockholm. His father worked as a chef at Grand Hôtel in the city, his mother as a cleaner at the local school. His father was a functioning alcoholic. At 14 years of age he witnessed his brother's friend's suicide by jumping. His two siblings, sister Ranka and brother Radomir "Rajko", died due to drug usage.

He has been trained in Taekwondo since his youth, and has a black belt. His childhood idol was Bruce Lee. At 18 years of age, in 1987, he became the Nordic Champion in taekwondo. In 1990, he and his friend Liam Norberg were involved in the robbery of bank Götabanken; he stood guard some hundred meters away. He was arrested and sentenced to three years and six months in prison for the robbery, and served his sentence at Hall Prison. He studied Buddhism in prison. After serving his sentence, he entered into a sports college. He then started a gym, and became a sports consultant. He was a top program trainer in the Swedish Olympics Committee from 2000 to 2004.

After a few minor acting roles, such as in the Wallander film Kuriren (2009), he got his big break out in 2010 as Mrado, in the critically acclaimed film Easy Money (2010).

In 2014, he co-starred in the Tom Cruise film, Edge of Tomorrow.

In January 2015, he gave his voice and likeness to Dragan in the video game Payday 2. Mrsic is the only cast member in the game who has previously been involved in illegal activities.

In his gym, "Extreme Training", he has trained sportspeople such as Martina Navratilova, Helen Alfredsson and Douglas Murray and actors such as Rooney Mara.

He also starred in Stjärnorna på slottet in seasons 2019/2020.

Mrsic is cohabitation with the PT coach Isabel Alonso. They met in 1992 and have a daughter and a son together.
data.name: Dragomir Mrsic

Radosław Marek Pazura (ur. 7 maja 1969 w Tomaszowie Mazowieckim) – polski aktor filmowy, telewizyjny, dubbingowy, teatralny oraz lektor.

Będąc na pierwszym roku studiów aktorskich w Łodzi, zagrał swoją pierwszą rolę – studenta o imieniu Rafał, w filmie Jacka Bromskiego, "1968. Szczęśliwego Nowego Roku". To z kolei zaowocowało otrzymaniem głównej roli w filmie Juliusza Machulskiego pt. "Szwadron".

Półroczny okres zdjęciowy spowodował, że aktor przeszedł na indywidualny tok nauczania, dzięki czemu już po trzecim roku ukończył studia. W tym czasie zdążył jeszcze zagrać w kilku produkcjach filmowych, takich jak: "Pożegnanie z Marią" Filipa Zylberta, "Oczy niebieskie" Waldemara Szarka czy "Nowe przygody Arsena Lupina" Alaina Nahuma oraz obronił pracę magisterską i otrzymał tytuł magistra sztuki. Pracę dyplomową zaliczył rolami Jeremina w filmie "Szwadron" Juliusza Machulskiego oraz Clifa w przedstawieniu "Miłość i gniew" w reżyserii Krzysztofa Kolbergera.

Przez cały okres swojej kariery tylko raz zagrał na deskach Teatru na Woli w sztuce pt. "Cud na Greenpoincie" w roli Punka. Zaistniał jednakże w ponad 20 filmach kinowych i telewizyjnych, w kilkunastu serialach i teatrach telewizji, grając główne oraz drugoplanowe role. Sporadycznie użyczał swojego głosu w dubbingu. (Wikipedia)

已故艺人梁醒波之女。梁葆贞最为人所认识的是1981年至1986年期间，在处境喜剧《香港八一》系列中担演“顺嫂”一角，而由于其扮演的的典型传统妇女角色深入民心，渐渐地“顺嫂”一词亦时被用作形容无知妇孺的意思。

1994年，梁葆贞在另一处境喜剧《餐餐有宋家》中饰演宋亚好一角，她所扮演的是家族中的姑婆角色，性格偷小便宜、无知，但对家人照顾周到。其后，梁葆贞在长寿剧《真情》中担演拿督归龄高夫人司徒珠一角，再次为港人所熟悉。

梁葆贞是香港演艺人协会的成员之一。约满后定居加拿大，至今仍有在无线电视的剧集中作幕前演出。
data.name: 梁葆贞

伊藤健太郎（日语：伊藤 健太郎／いとう けんたろう Itō Kentarō，1974年1月3日—），日本男性配音员、舞台演员、旁白。Mausu Promotion所属、剧团K-Show主宰。出身于东京都八王子市。身高165cm。A型血。

伊藤早年从明治学院东村山高等学校毕业后，因为有朋友在剧团帮忙而得到这个机会，开始对“芝居的世界”产生兴趣。1993年，伊藤进入桐朋学园短期大学就读演剧科系。同年夏天，以《小妇人》成为他的第一次舞台公演。

1995年，伊藤以职业芝居师的身份加入剧团21世纪FOX（声优肝付兼太率领），从此正式踏入声优业界。2001年，移籍至东京俳优生活协同组合（简称俳协），2009年4月从俳协离所。2009年5月加入Mediarte，但Mediarte不久之后解散，立即加入amuleto（旧名：ARKRAY）。2016年6月1日起加入现在所属的Mausu Promotion。

2003年于俳协时期，成立现在主宰的剧团K-Show。同时在“俳协 45th ANNIVERSARY”的问卷调查写着“现在这是一个很重要的剧团”，并写说将来的梦想是成立一间独立的剧团工作室。

data.biography:
Chosen Jacobs (* 3. Juli 2001 in Springfield, Massachusetts) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Seit dem Jahr 2016 ist er als Schauspieler aktiv, nachdem er in dem Kurzfilm "Remnants" die Rolle des George übernahm. Dafür wurde er als Bester Nebendarsteller in einem Film auf dem Endless Mountains Film Festival ausgezeichnet. Im selben Jahr übernahm er als Will Grover eine wiederkehrende Rolle in der Serie "Hawaii Five-0".

Seinen Durchbruch hatte er 2017 als Mike Hanlon in "Es", einer Verfilmung von Stephen Kings gleichnamigen Roman.

data.original_title: 映画ドラえもん のび太の宇宙小戦争 2021
data.overview: Nobita tình cờ gặp được người ngoài hành tinh tí hon Papi, vốn là Tổng thống của hành tinh Pirika, chạy trốn tới Trái Đất để thoát khỏi những kẻ nổi loạn nơi quê nhà. Doraemon, Nobita và hội bạn thân dùng bảo bối đèn pin thu nhỏ biến đổi theo kích cỡ giống Papi để chơi cùng cậu bé. Thế nhưng, một tàu chiến không gian tấn công cả nhóm. Cảm thấy có trách nhiệm vì liên lụy mọi người, Papi quyết định một mình đương đầu với quân phiến loạn tàn ác. Doraemon và các bạn lên đường đến hành tinh Pirika, sát cánh bên người bạn của mình.
data.title: Doraemon: Nobita và Cuộc Chiến Vũ Trụ Tí Hon
